The term subject verb agreement means that the 00:29:44 subject and the verb agree in number so a singular noun takes 00:29:51 a singular verb here is an example Joe works at 00:29:58 a restaurant the subject Joe is singular that explains why 00:30:04 we use the word works the singular form of the verb if the subject were 00:30:11 plural the verb would be different as in Joe and Tom 00:30:18 work at 00:30:19 a restaurant Joe and Tom are 2 people that is why we use 00:30:25 work the plural form of the verb This is the basic idea of subject verb 00:30:32 agreement however English speakers do not always use singular 00:30:39 nouns with singular verbs as we will see when the subject of 00:30:45 a sentence involves time money or distance English speakers do not use the 00:30:52 subject verb agreement in the way that you might expect here is an 00:30:58 example imagine you hear these $2.00 statements $1.00 is 00:31:05 too much $5.00 is too much in the 00:31:12 1st sentence the subject is one dollar one dollar is singular the 00:31:19 verb b. 00:31:20 Is also singular in the 2nd sentence the subject is 5 dollars 00:31:27 5 dollars is plural.
